'''Diran Miciluz''' was a weapons designer working for [[Hydrospeare Corporation]].

==Biography==

Miciluz was a native of the [[Ktilac Regions/Legends|Ktilac Regions]], a part of [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]] with few [[Human/Legends|Human]] inhabitants. This led many to believe that his parents were probably traders or scouts. Miciluz's green hair also suggests that he descended from the crew of RSF [[Invincible-class Dreadnaught Heavy Cruiser|''Invincible''-class Dreadnaught]] [[Noble (starship)|''Noble'']], lost centuries ago.<ref name="AIR" />

Even in his early twenties, Miciluz was a great weapons designer, working in the elite team of Hydrospeare, [[Design Team Beta]], and always wanting to improve concepts and ideas, be they his own or not. As a member of Design Team Beta, Miciluz worked mainly in projects for the Imperial Army.<ref name="AIR" />

The [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] [[Task Force on Alliance Security|Task Force]] discovered that Miciluz had helped improving the range and accuracy of [[BlasTech Industries/Legends|BlasTech]] [[HY-6 heavy cannon]]s, which were being increasingly used by the Empire in aquatic applications.<ref name="AIR" />

Around [[2 ABY/Legends|2 ABY]], intercepted communications between Miciluz and several [[Moff/Legends|Moffs]] revealed that he was working on no less than sixteen weapon prototypes. The Rebel Task Force asked General [[Crix Madine/Legends|Crix Madine]] to send agents to steal those plans for Rebel use.<ref name="AIR" />
